name: @imenam/refactoring-mcp
description: MCP server to copy or move code blocks between files, with optional directory confinement.

scripts.release:patch: npm version patch && npm publish --access public && git push origin main --follow-tags
scripts.release:minor: npm version minor && npm publish --access public && git push origin main --follow-tags
scripts.release:major: npm version major && npm publish --access public && git push origin main --follow-tags

author: imenam
